description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and an IMAGE_TAG variable set to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Add a before_script that logs in to the registry with docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY. Define a build job in the build stage that runs echo "IMAGE_TAG=$IMAGE_TAG", then docker build -t $IMAGE_TAG . and docker push $IMAGE_TAG. Define a deploy job in the deploy stage that runs docker -v, docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, docker pull $IMAGE_TAG and executes sh deploy.sh. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are specified.
